rationale: The cited paper is a close conceptual antecedent: it tests how external examples/primes and form fixation affect originality in new product ideation, which directly overlaps with the citing paper’s focus on how seeing others’ prior ideas constrains creativity. The citing note explicitly says it extends prior brainstorming/ideation work on helpful vs harmful effects of others’ ideas, so this is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism reference rather than an incidental mention.
